description: Paper-fidelity check: sweep inference inner-loop opt steps on OOD to compare with IRED Table 2. Uses baseline checkpoint (no mining). inference_opt_steps is overridden via CLI --inference-opt-steps.
notes: Paper-fidelity check. IRED Table 2 harder-difficulty: 10 steps=0.2110, 20=0.2100, 30=0.2090, 40=0.2063. Our baseline OOD=0.2063 with default 5 inner steps x 10 landscapes = 50 total. Sweep inner steps {1,2,5,10,20} to map step semantics.
